title: Thai-Style Eggplant Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful Thai-inspired stir fry made with eggplant, stir-fry sauce, and your choice of protein.

ingredients.name: Garnish options
ingredients.notes: Sliced chili peppers, lime wedges, or chopped peanuts

instructions: Heat the floral oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the eggplant and cook until it starts to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the stir-fry sauce and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the eggplant is coated.
Add the cooked noodles to the wok and stir-fry for about 2 minutes, until well combined.
Stir in the chopped Thai basil and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
Serve hot, garnished with your choice of options.
